Tests requiring multi-org switching cannot execute with current credential mapping.

errors: 38 of 39 test cases BLOCKED: {{ORG_USER_EMAIL}} maps to a single-org user (Emily Johnson / TechFlow) after the 2026-05-19 credential repoint. Tests B2C-ORG-001 through B2C-ORG-038 require multi-org capabilities (switching, cart isolation, pricing per-org, address scoping, org search). Recommend: (a) map {{ORG_USER_EMAIL}} to MULTI_ORG_USER_EMAIL (ricreyacrouyi-3425@yopmail.com) in suite Test_Data columns, or (b) re-seed a multi-org agent user for the playwright-chrome slot. Additionally, {{USER_EMAIL}} (mutykovaelena@gmail.com) is a multi-org user, not a personal non-org user — B2C-ORG-010 and B2C-ORG-031 preconditions cannot be met with this mapping.
